hero.title: Fake news is a crime and must be fought.
hero.description: Regardless of social class, profession, or position, no one deserves to be a victim of fake news. A person can be seriously harmed personally or professionally because of fake news. The Federal Constitution guarantees freedom of expression (articles 5 and 220), but this freedom is not absolute. It has limits when other rights are violated, such as: honor, image, privacy, and public safety.
